response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators), but falls well short of a Principal/Director-level IC role. The resume shows ~13-15 years of hands-on development without evidence of principal-level technical leadership, no demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms, no cloud-scale architecture ownership, and no advanced degree or recognized AI expertise. Title progression peaks at Staff/Senior, and there is no indication of advising strategic customers or shaping multi-org technical strategy.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput services
Recent exposure to AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks at current role
Demonstrated community leadership through workshops, talks, and open-source projects (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise required for an AI Strategy principal role
Career trajectory tops out at Senior/Staff IC — lacks principal/director-level scope, strategic advisory, or executive-facing experience
Minimal cloud-platform depth (some AWS CDK exposure only); no large-scale cloud architecture or platform strategy work

key_factors.factor: Insufficient seniority and strategic scope for principal IC role
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling exposure
